evaluations.title: HDAC3-NCoR Eraser Depletion by ECM Stiffness Creates Enhancer Stabilization Independent of Writer Activation
evaluations.rationale: Genuinely novel paradigm inversion with strong experimental design. All grounded claims verify. HDAC1/2 compensation concern is real but addressable. A-485 vs RGFP966 dissection is the strongest single experiment in the session. Zero citation hallucinations.

claims_verified.claim: HDAC3 downregulated by ECM stiffening in chondrocytes
claims_verified.note: Paper exists. Substrate studied was Parkin (non-histone), not enhancer H3K27ac. Context transfer to enhancers is an inference.

claims_verified.claim: HDAC3-NCoR at enhancers removes H3K27ac
Global histone acetylation increases on stiff ECM
NCoR-HDAC3 complex requires DAD domain interaction for activity
HDAC3 is the dominant H3K27ac eraser at enhancers across cell types
claims_verified.note: HDAC1/2 (NuRD complex) also deacetylate H3K27ac. Class I HDACs share ~50% homology. Knutson 2008 HDAC3 KO shows partial phenotype.

claims_verified.claim: Magnitude of H3K27ac half-life extension from partial HDAC3 depletion

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Eraser-depletion model is orthogonal to the YAP-EP300 writer-activation paradigm dominating mechanobiology. From parametric knowledge, no published paper proposes HDAC3 depletion as a stiffness-to-enhancer mechanism. Cannot fully verify in blind mode.
evaluations.citation_audit: 4 citations checked. 0 hallucinations. Fu 2024 context transfer (Parkin to enhancer H3K27ac) is an inference, not fabrication.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: Novelty cannot be web-verified. Flag for post-blind novelty check: has anyone proposed eraser depletion under ECM stiffness?

evaluations.title: TET2-DNA Methylation Memory Handoff: Mechanically-Induced H3K27ac as 6-12h Temporal Window for TET2-Mediated CpG Demethylation
evaluations.rationale: Well-constructed hypothesis addressing a fundamental question (molecular basis of mechanical memory). All grounded claims verify. Central weakness — TET2 recruitment at stiffness-gained enhancers is entirely parametric — is acknowledged and the experimental design specifically tests this. 6-12h temporal window is mechanistically coherent. Borderline PASS at 7.0.

claims_verified.claim: TET2 enriched at H3K27ac+ enhancers via OGT/CXXC domain
TET2 oxidation cascade 5mC→5hmC→5fC→5caC
TDG-mediated BER completes demethylation
EP300-BRD4 interaction STRING 0.988
CTGF/CYR61 are canonical YAP targets
EP300-MLL3/4-COMPASS co-occupancy at enhancers
TET2 co-occupancy at stiffness-gained H3K27ac peaks in hMSCs
claims_verified.note: General TET2-H3K27ac link grounded but NOT shown under stiffness conditions.

claims_verified.claim: CpG demethylation rate at mechano-enhancer shores within 6-12h
DNMT1 maintenance kinetics in non-cycling hMSCs for 3-14d retention
claims_verified.note: DNMT1 maintenance tied to DNA replication. Non-cycling cell dynamics uncharacterized.

evaluations.novelty_evidence: DNA methylation as molecular substrate for mechanical memory is novel. Yang 2014 showed mechanical memory at gene expression level without epigenetic substrate. H3K27ac→TET2→CpG demethylation chain under stiffness not previously proposed.
evaluations.citation_audit: 6 grounded citations checked. 0 hallucinations. All sources are real and say what is claimed.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: Cannot web-verify novelty. TET2-stiffness link may have been published recently. Flag for post-blind check.

evaluations.title: Sequential Two-Phase UTX Bivalent Enhancer Activation: YAP-EP300 Phase 1 Feeds Forward to UTX/MLL3-COMPASS Phase 2
evaluations.rationale: Most mechanistically specific hypothesis in the session with the strongest experimental design (four-arm siRNA, temporal A-485 dissection). MLL3/4-PHD independent UTX recruitment concern is substantive but does not invalidate — temporal predictions remain testable regardless. Zero citation hallucinations. Score adjusted from raw 8.5 to 7.5 to reflect feedforward uncertainty.

claims_verified.claim: EP300-BRD4 interaction STRING 0.988
CTGF/CYR61 are canonical YAP target genes
EP300 and MLL3/4-COMPASS co-occupy enhancers
UTX (KDM6A) is canonical COMPASS-associated enhancer H3K27me3 demethylase
KDM6B primarily at stress-inducible promoters
claims_verified.note: KDM6B at promoters vs KDM6A at enhancers is well-established distinction.

claims_verified.claim: EP300→COMPASS feedforward via BRD4-NIPBL proximity
claims_verified.note: BRD4-NIPBL interaction exists (Olley 2018 context) but feedforward under stiffness is inferred.

claims_verified.claim: KDM6A CUT&RUN timing: enrichment at bivalent enhancers at 12-18h (not 4h)
8-14h temporal gap as mechanistic prediction (not kinetic delay)

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Two-phase temporal model for bivalent enhancer resolution under ECM stiffness appears novel. Bivalent enhancers well-studied in development (Bernstein 2006) but behavior under mechanical signals underexplored.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: Cannot web-verify novelty. The feedforward claim requires post-blind literature check for any MLL3/4-COMPASS studies under mechanical stimulation.

evaluations.title: Integrin Force-Induced H3K9me3 Demethylation at Nuclear Interior Enhancers Creates Competence Windows for H3K27ac Activation
evaluations.rationale: Interesting competence window concept with creative experimental design. However, three significant concerns: (1) Sun 2020 used cyclic magnetic bead force, not static ECM stiffness — fundamental methodological transfer problem; (2) KDM4A identity is speculative; (3) H3K4me1+H3K9me3 enhancer population may be too small to detect reliably.
conditions_for_pass: Provide evidence that static ECM stiffness produces H3K9me3 changes comparable to cyclic bead force
Estimate H3K4me1+H3K9me3 enhancer population size in hMSCs from Roadmap/ENCODE data
Include magnetic bead replication as positive control with prediction if static stiffness does NOT replicate Sun 2020

claims_verified.claim: Integrin force → H3K9me3 demethylation at nuclear interior loci
claims_verified.note: CRITICAL CAVEAT: Sun 2020 used cyclic magnetic bead force (pN-range, oscillating), not static ECM stiffness. Mechanotransduction pathway may differ.

claims_verified.claim: Nuclear interior vs periphery differential force response
H3K4me1 and H3K9me3 co-occur at some regulatory regions
claims_verified.note: Co-occurrence may be rare (<2% in some cell types).

claims_verified.claim: KDM4A/JMJD2A as specific force-responsive demethylase
claims_verified.note: Sun 2020 did not identify the enzyme.

claims_verified.claim: 5-15% of enhancers in H3K9me3+ regions
Two-step model: H3K9me3 removal prerequisite for H3K27ac

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Competence window concept for mechanobiology appears novel. H3K9me3 dynamics under mechanical force is understudied.
evaluations.citation_audit: 2 grounded citations. 0 hallucinations. Sun 2020 PMID 32270037 is real. Context transfer from cyclic force to static stiffness is a significant extrapolation.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: Cannot verify whether static ECM stiffness → H3K9me3 has been published. Flag for post-blind check.

evaluations.title: Dual YAP+MRTF Programs in CTCF-Permitted Loop Domains via NIPBL-Cohesin
evaluations.rationale: Well-grounded individual components with established pharmacological dissection. However, the hypothesis is more of a characterization study than a mechanistic hypothesis with a surprising prediction. CTCF-permitted framing is conservative and expected. Testability reduced by HiChIP technical demands and cell system inconsistency (MCF10A vs hMSCs).
conditions_for_pass: Specify a surprising prediction that the dual-program model makes beyond simple 'two TFs → two gene sets'
Resolve cell system inconsistency (justify MCF10A or run both MCF10A and hMSCs)
Provide HiChIP feasibility details: cell numbers, sequencing depth, expected contact resolution

claims_verified.claim: MRTF-A sequestered by G-actin; nuclear on F-actin
YAP nuclear translocation requires stiffness ≥15-20 kPa in hMSCs
CArG-box is MRTF-SRF binding motif
TEAD motif for YAP-TEAD binding
>70% of active enhancer-promoter loops anchored at CTCF sites
NIPBL-cohesin facilitates enhancer-promoter contacts
<20% shared target genes between YAP-TEAD and MRTF-SRF on stiff ECM
CArG-motif enhancers show increased HiChIP contacts for ACTA2/VCL promoters
CTCF positions unchanged under ECM stiffness

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Dual-program 3D contact network framing is partially novel. Individual components (YAP, MRTF, CTCF, cohesin) are well-established. The 3D contact layer adds spatial resolution but may be expected.
evaluations.citation_audit: 6 grounded citations checked. 0 hallucinations. All PMIDs and sources are real.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: Cannot verify whether H3K27ac HiChIP under stiffness has been published. Flag for post-blind check.

meta_validation.kill_rate_assessment: Marginally permissive but appropriate for blind mode. C2-H7 at 5.5 sits exactly at CONDITIONAL_PASS threshold. In web-verified mode, the Sun 2020 methodological transfer problem might push it to FAIL. Two CONDITIONAL_PASS with specific conditions ensures accountability without premature kills.
patterns: Groundedness is the universal bottleneck — all 5 hypotheses score lowest here. Structurally expected: grounded novel bridges would already be published.
Testability is uniformly strong (1.0-2.0). Session produced experimentally actionable hypotheses.
Zero citation hallucinations across all 5 hypotheses. Marked improvement over cycle 1 (Whitworth 2024 concern).
Mechanistic specificity correlates with QG score: E1-H3 (highest) and C2-H6 (paradigm inversion) score highest.
meta_validation.strongest_hypothesis: E1-H3 (Sequential Two-Phase UTX Bivalent Enhancer Activation) — tied at 7.5 with C2-H6. E1-H3 has highest mechanistic specificity and best experimental design. C2-H6 has highest novelty (paradigm inversion).
meta_validation.weakest_surviving: C2-H7 (H3K9me3 Competence Windows) at 5.5 — methodological transfer problem, speculative enzyme identity, uncertain population size.
meta_validation.cycle2_vs_cycle1: Substantial improvement. More hypotheses passing (3 PASS + 2 CONDITIONAL vs 1 PASS + 2 CONDITIONAL in cycle 1), broader mechanistic diversity (5 distinct mechanisms vs 3), zero citation issues. Evolution of C1-H3→E1-H3 and C1-H4→E1-H4 shows clear quality improvement.
recommendations: Proceed to empirical validation layer with all 5 hypotheses
Priority for cross-model validation: C2-H6 (novelty verification), E1-H3 (feedforward verification), E1-H4 (TET2-stiffness link verification)
Post-blind web verification targets: C2-H6 novelty, C2-H7 static stiffness→H3K9me3, E1-H5 stiffness HiChIP literature
